About Us

We connect creators
with brands that matter.

GetXH is India's fastest-growing influencer marketing platform. We built it because brands were wasting money on reach, and creators weren't getting paid their worth.

We fix that — with verified creators, transparent pricing, real-time analytics, and instant payments. No middlemen. No guesswork.

What We Do

Everything a brand needs
to scale with creators.

One platform. End-to-end creator marketing — from discovery to payment to analytics.

🎯

Creator Discovery

Find creators by niche, follower count, engagement rate, city, and language. Filter that matters.

📋

Campaign Management

Brief → Approve → Publish. Manage multiple creators and deliverables from a single dashboard.

💸

Instant Payments

Creators get paid automatically once content is approved. No delays. No manual transfers.

📊

Real-time Analytics

Track reach, engagement, conversions, and ROI across all creators in your campaign live.

🤝

Brand Safety

Content review before it goes live. Ensure your brand guidelines are always respected.

🔗

Multi-Platform

Instagram, YouTube, Reels, Shorts — manage campaigns across platforms from one place.

How It Works

From brief to results
in 4 simple steps.

01

Post a Brief

Tell us your product, goal, budget, and target audience. Takes 5 minutes.

02

Match Creators

We match your brand with the most relevant creators from our verified network.

03

Review Content

Approve creator content before it goes live. Full control, zero risk.

04

Track & Scale

Watch your results in real-time. Scale winning creators, pause what's not working.
